visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins with a close-up of a white heart-shaped snowball hanging from a thin, needle-covered branch of an evergreen tree. The background is a soft-focus forest with dappled sunlight. (2) A hand wearing a black and white patterned glove holds a similar white snow heart up toward the camera lens, showcasing its shape. (3) Sunlight sparkles on the surface of another snow heart hanging on a branch, highlighting its icy texture in a tight close-up shot. (4) A man wearing a black and white patterned jacket with an orange vest is visible in the blurry background of a snowy park. (5) The camera captures the man in a medium shot as he crouches on the snowy ground, using a bright red heart-shaped plastic snowball maker to press snow. (6) A close-up shows the red tool opening to reveal a perfectly formed snow heart. (7) The man carefully hangs a red-colored snow heart onto the tree branch next to the white ones. (8) He stands back and gestures excitedly toward the tree, which is now decorated with multiple hearts. (9) A woman wearing a yellow long-sleeve shirt and pink overalls enters the frame; she smiles broadly and looks at the decorated tree. (10) The couple stands together in front of the tree, both smiling and making small finger-heart gestures toward the camera in a medium full shot.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV：嘎哥的浪漫愛心樹. [Subtitle]: Snow Love Tree. (2) [Subtitle]: 送你的愛心樹.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female recipient, and approximately 6 distant passers-by in the background snow field.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a black and white geometric patterned jacket with a bright orange utility vest. A woman in a vibrant yellow sweatshirt and light pink denim overalls.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A snowy outdoor recreation area or park with evergreen trees, a wooden cabin structure in the distance, and several people walking in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a bouncy, upbeat instrumental track featuring bright, crystalline synthesizer bells and a steady, rhythmic drum beat. The atmosphere is lighthearted and whimsical. (2) A male voice enters with a high-pitched, enthusiastic delivery, saying '送你的愛心樹' followed by 'Love Tree'. The speech is clear and carries a high positive valence. (3) A female voice is heard laughing and reacting with joyful, indistinct vocalizations as the BGM continues to play at a consistent volume. (4) The track maintains the lively music and the sounds of the couple's happy chatter and laughter until the video ends abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A romantic and playful winter vlog snippet where the male creator demonstrates his creativity by making a 'Snow Love Tree' out of heart-shaped snowballs to delight his partner. The video serves as lighthearted couple content intended to share a sweet, seasonal moment with their audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal audio-visual combination with bright colors and upbeat music to create a positive emotional impact. The use of a simple, recognizable shape (the heart) as a motif throughout makes the content easily digestible and shares a clear theme of affection.
